device_name: Vantage Galan 3T, MRT-3020, V8.0 with AiCE Reconstruction Processing Unit for MR
intended_use: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the
intended_use_full: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the head or body. Additionally, this system is capable of non-contrast enhanced imaging, such as MRA.
ground_truth: Volunteer images and phantom images; no formal ground truth comparison reported
other_metrics: SureVOI Liver, LiverLine+, ProstateLine+, and W-SpineLine+ met predetermined acceptance criteria for successful detection; Ceiling camera patient orientation detection met predetermined acceptance criteria for percentage of successful detection and cases requiring no correction; mART EXP confirmed to reduce distortion artifacts in readout and slice directions; RDC DWI confirmed to reduce phase encoding direction distortion; pCASL CBF values met predetermined acceptance criteria; IMC confirmed effective in reducing motion artifacts
